generatedSentence: The hapless grownup backpacker, a vested keeper and lover of forgotten vowels, experienced major hiccups in the foreground, his braindead mind resting; observation of the uniformly acidic waste surrounding his dejunks project, where a flamethrower replaced intimacy, suggested his paramedic skills were outnumbering his ability to escape via ejector, rendering a vroom sound from a distant panda.  Unmasked, this talented country cabalist, normally the gatekeeper of a legendary warehouse where untraceable items were kept, found himself majorly vested in a quest; the metro nightcrawler’s abstract headache was undeniable, a consequence of his kingly gesture to negate the cosmic leakage from a cracked dome, now just flakes of a pumpkin.  The caffeine-fueled adjutant, monitoring a monster's pathology through his tablet, knew this was the ultimate offense; the rider, having used his ninja literacy to navigate the router's options, spotted the vessel’s key, a domino, within the observatory's odorous ashtray, understanding the necessity to backspace his previous research, despite the worry of volcano-level noise.  Hallelujah! The gymnast, now free from his handicap, offered a kind request via telephone, his workout padding a soft cushion as the solar twinkle of his new platform shone; checking his milk, he saw his baldness was a blessing, a snuggly joke, no longer an ingrown torment, just a week of therapy, a decanter, and a jalopy to take him home.
panelSentences: The hapless grownup backpacker, a vested keeper and lover of forgotten vowels, experienced major hiccups in the foreground, his braindead mind resting; observation of the uniformly acidic waste surrounding his dejunks project, where a flamethrower replaced intimacy, suggested his paramedic skills were outnumbering his ability to escape via ejector, rendering a vroom sound from a distant panda.

Unmasked, this talented country cabalist, normally the gatekeeper of a legendary warehouse where untraceable items were kept, found himself majorly vested in a quest; the metro nightcrawler’s abstract headache was undeniable, a consequence of his kingly gesture to negate the cosmic leakage from a cracked dome, now just flakes of a pumpkin.

The caffeine-fueled adjutant, monitoring a monster's pathology through his tablet, knew this was the ultimate offense; the rider, having used his ninja literacy to navigate the router's options, spotted the vessel’s key, a domino, within the observatory's odorous ashtray, understanding the necessity to backspace his previous research, despite the worry of volcano-level noise.

Hallelujah! The gymnast, now free from his handicap, offered a kind request via telephone, his workout padding a soft cushion as the solar twinkle of his new platform shone; checking his milk, he saw his baldness was a blessing, a snuggly joke, no longer an ingrown torment, just a week of therapy, a decanter, and a jalopy to take him home.

Unmasked, this talented country cabalist, normally the gatekeeper of a legendary warehouse where untraceable items were kept, found himself majorly vested in a quest; the metro nightcrawler’s abstract headache was undeniable, a consequence of his kingly gesture to negate the cosmic leakage from a cracked dome, now just flakes of a pumpkin.

The caffeine-fueled adjutant, monitoring a monster's pathology through his tablet, knew this was the ultimate offense; the rider, having used his ninja literacy to navigate the router's options, spotted the vessel’s key, a domino, within the observatory's odorous ashtray, understanding the necessity to backspace his previous research, despite the worry of volcano-level noise.

Hallelujah! The gymnast, now free from his handicap, offered a kind request via telephone, his workout padding a soft cushion as the solar twinkle of his new platform shone; checking his milk, he saw his baldness was a blessing, a snuggly joke, no longer an ingrown torment, just a week of therapy, a decanter, and a jalopy to take him home.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. A lone, weary male figure, wearing a patched utility jumpsuit and a wide-brimmed cybernetic hat. TOP-LEFT PANEL: A close-up shot of the backpacker's weary face in the foreground, a reflection of glowing acidic waste in his cybernetic hat. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A wide shot of the unmasked cabalist standing at the gate of a massive, glowing futuristic warehouse, a cracked, domed structure visible in the distance. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: A medium shot of the adjutant, intensely focused on a glowing tablet, a monstrous shadow looming behind him, in a high-tech observatory. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: A full shot of the gymnast, now with a confident smile, performing a graceful pose on a solar-powered platform, a vintage jalopy parked nearby.

definitions.definition: Very unlucky; ill-fated.
Devoid of talent or skill.
A spasm of the diaphragm, or the resulting sound.
definitions.example: There was a loud hiccup from the back of the room and the class erupted in laughter.

definitions.definition: (by extension) Any spasm or sudden change.
A minor setback.
definitions.example: There's been a slight hiccup in the processing of this quarter's results.

definitions.definition: To produce a hiccup; have the hiccups.
To say with a hiccup.
definitions.example: "I haven't touched a drop, officer," the suspect hiccupped.

definitions.definition: To produce an abortive sound like a hiccup.
definitions.example: The car engine hiccupped but wouldn't start.

definitions.definition: (usually with "the") The condition of having the spasms of hiccupping.
definitions.example: He has the hiccups - give him a glass of water.

definitions.definition: The elements of an image which lie closest to the picture plane.
The subject of an image, often depicted at the bottom in a two-dimensional work.
The application the user is currently interacting with; the application window that appears in front of all others.
To place in the foreground (physically or metaphorically).
(stative) to be more in number than somebody or something.
definitions.example: Women outnumbered men by two to one.

definitions.definition: Significantly; very, very much
Mostly, primarily
Irrefutable, or impossible to deny
definitions.example: Some believe that there is undeniable evidence of UFOs.

definitions.definition: In a uniform manner, consistently.
The sound of an engine revving up.
To move with great speed; to zoom.
The sound of an engine revving up.
definitions.example: I never saw my uncle’s Ferrari, but I could always hear it going vroom as it flew past by my house.

definitions.definition: To clothe with, or as with, a vestment, or garment; to dress; to robe; to cover, surround, or encompass closely.
To clothe with authority, power, etc.; to put in possession; to invest; to furnish; to endow; followed by with and the thing conferred.
definitions.example: to vest a court with power to try cases of life and death

definitions.definition: To place or give into the possession or discretion of some person or authority; to commit to another; with in before the possessor.
definitions.example: The power of life and death is vested in the king, or in the courts.

definitions.definition: To invest; to put.
definitions.example: to vest money in goods, land, or houses

definitions.definition: To clothe with possession; also, to give a person an immediate fixed right of present or future enjoyment of.
definitions.example: an estate is vested in possession

definitions.definition: (of an inheritance or a trust fund) To devolve upon the person currently entitled when a prior interest has ended.
definitions.example: Upon the death of the Sovereign the Crown automatically vests in the next heir without the need of coronation or other formality.

definitions.definition: (financial) To become vested, to become permanent.
definitions.example: My pension vests at the end of the month and then I can take it with me when I quit.

definitions.definition: Settled, fixed or absolute, with no contingencies.
Dressed or clothed, especially in vestments.
definitions.example: The Pope, vested in mitre and cope, is greeted by a newly created Cardinal.

definitions.definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.
A letter representing the sound of vowel; in English, the vowels are a, e, i, o, u, and sometimes y.
The red panda (Ailurus fulgens), a small raccoon-like animal of northeast Asia with reddish fur and a long, ringed tail.
Short for giant panda.
(law enforcement) Short for panda car.
To remove junk from; declutter.
To encircle something or simultaneously extend in all directions.
To enclose or confine something on all sides so as to prevent escape.
To pass around; to travel about; to circumnavigate.
definitions.example: to surround the world

definitions.definition: An outlying area; area in proximity to something
An environment
Which surrounds something
To cease from action, motion, work, or performance of any kind; stop; desist; be without motion.
To come to a pause or an end; end.
To be free from that which harasses or disturbs; be quiet or still; be undisturbed.
To be or to put into a state of rest.
definitions.example: I shall not rest until I have uncovered the truth.

definitions.definition: To stay, remain, be situated.
definitions.example: The blame seems to rest with your father.

definitions.definition: To lean, lie, or lay.
definitions.example: A column rests on its pedestal.

definitions.definition: To complete one's active advocacy in a trial or other proceeding, and thus to wait for the outcome (however, one is still generally available to answer questions, etc.)
definitions.example: I rest my case.

definitions.definition: To sleep; slumber.
To lie dormant.
To sleep the final sleep; sleep in death; die; be dead.
To rely or depend on.
definitions.example: The decision rests on getting a bank loan.

definitions.definition: To be satisfied; to acquiesce.
To remain.
To arrest.
The action of rest
A place where one can rest; a resting-place.
A pause; a break; an interlude.
That rests; that is not in action or in the process of growth.
Unemployed; out of work.
Remaining; stationary.
Having an irreversible loss of brain function and cessation of brain activity.
Having no useful thoughts; stupid; ditzy.
A traveler whose luggage consists of a backpack; especially, such a traveler who uses hostels, public transport, and other inexpensive services.
One who, or that which, ejects or dispossesses.
A jet jump for lifting water or withdrawing air from a space. {Ejector condenser} (Steam Engine), a condenser in which the vacuum is maintained by a jet pump.
Ejector seat: a pilot's seat in an airplane that can be forcibly ejected in the case of an emergency; then the pilot descends by parachute.
That part of the mechanism of a breech-loading firearm which ejects the empty shell.
A lever for removing circuit boards from an electronic chassis.
The act of observing, and the fact of being observed (see observance)
The act of noting and recording some event; or the record of such noting.
A remark or comment.
A judgement based on observing.
Performance of what is prescribed; adherence in practice; observance.
A regime under which a subject is routinely observed.
Philosophically as: the phenomenal presence of human being existence.
One who keeps something.
definitions.example: Finders keepers; losers weepers].

definitions.definition: A person or thing worth keeping.
A person charged with guarding or caring for, storing, or maintaining something; a custodian, a guard; sometimes a gamekeeper.
The player charged with guarding a goal or wicket. Short form of goalkeeper, wicketkeeper.
A part of a mechanism that catches or retains another part, for example the part of a door lock that fits in the frame and receives the bolt.
An offensive play in which the quarterback runs toward the goal with the ball after it is snapped.
One who remains or keeps in a place or position.
A fruit or vegetable that keeps for some time without spoiling.
One who loves and cares for another person in a romantic way; a sweetheart, love, soulmate, boyfriend, girlfriend or spouse.
A sexual partner, especially one with whom someone is having an affair.
A person who loves something.
definitions.example: a lover of fine wines

definitions.definition: (with "my") An informal term of address for any friend.
definitions.example: All right, me lover?

definitions.definition: An adult (used especially by children).
Of, pertaining to, or suitable for adults.
Adult; fully developed; mature.

An individual trained to medically stabilize people through various interventions, victims of trauma or medical events outside of a hospital setting and preparing them for transport to a medical facility.
An individual who is licensed at the state or national level to practice medical interventions in an emergency pre-hospital setting.
A device that projects a flame for starting fires, and sometimes also additional fuel to help ignition. Used either as a weapon or a tool.
Feeling or atmosphere of closeness and openness towards someone else, not necessarily involving sexuality.
Intimate relationship.
(especially plural) Intimate detail, (item of) intimate information.
Having a pH less than 7, or being sour, or having the strength to neutralize alkalis, or turning a litmus paper red.
Containing a high percentage of silica; opposed to basic.
Of or relating to acid; having the character of an acid.
Not able to be traced or tracked down
To remove a mask from someone.
To expose, or reveal the true character of someone.
To remove one's mask.
To enable (an interrupt, etc.) by unsetting or setting the associated bit.
Not masked
No longer masked (from which a mask has been removed)
The main tower of a castle or fortress, located within the castle walls.
The food or money required to keep someone alive and healthy; one's support, maintenance.
definitions.example: He works as a cobbler's apprentice for his keep.

definitions.definition: The act or office of keeping; custody; guard; care; heed; charge; notice.
The state of being kept; hence, the resulting condition; case.
definitions.example: to be in good keep

definitions.definition: That which is kept in charge; a charge.
A cap for holding something, such as a journal box, in place.
To continue in (a course or mode of action); not to intermit or fall from; to uphold or maintain.
definitions.example: to keep silence;  to keep one's word;  to keep possession

definitions.definition: (heading) To hold the status of something.
(heading) To hold or be held in a state.
To wait for, keep watch for.
To act as wicket-keeper.
definitions.example: Godfrey Evans kept for England for many years.

definitions.definition: To take care; to be solicitous; to watch.
To be in session; to take place.
definitions.example: School keeps today.

definitions.definition: To observe; to adhere to; to fulfill; not to swerve from or violate.
(by extension) To visit (a place) often; to frequent.
To observe or celebrate (a holiday).
definitions.example: The feast of St. Stephen is kept on December 26.

definitions.definition: Keeping
A place for storing large amounts of products. In logistics, a place where products go to from the manufacturer before going to the retailer.
To store in a warehouse or similar.
To confine (a person) to an institution for a long period.
To acquire and then shelve, simply to prevent competitors from acquiring it.
definitions.example: the warehousing of syndicated TV shows

definitions.definition: A person or group who controls access to something or somebody.

A common orange and brown butterfly with eyespots, Pyronia tithonus, of the family Nymphalidae.
Endowed with one or more talents.
To make something holy by religious rite, sanctify.
To make the sign of the cross upon, so as to sanctify.
To invoke divine favor upon.
To honor as holy, glorify; to extol for excellence.
To esteem or account happy; to felicitate.
To wave; to brandish.
(past tense only blessed) To turn (a reference) into an object.
(with from) To secure, defend, or prevent from.
Some kind of divine or supernatural aid, or reward.
A pronouncement invoking divine aid.
Good fortune.
A modern pagan ceremony.
The act of declaring or bestowing favor; approval.

definitions.definition: Something someone is glad of.
definitions.example: After two weeks of sun, last night's rainfall was a blessing.

definitions.definition: A prayer before a meal; grace.
A group of unicorns.
(chiefly British) An area of land; a district, region.

A set region of land having particular human occupation or agreed limits, especially inhabited by members of the same race, speakers of the same language etc., or associated with a given person, occupation, species etc.
The territory of a nation, especially an independent nation state or formerly independent nation; a political entity asserting ultimate authority over a geographical area; a sovereign state.
(usually preceded by “the”) A rural area, as opposed to a town or city; the countryside.
The rock through which a vein runs.
The female genitalia, especially the vagina.
From or in the countryside or connected with it.
Of or connected to country music.
A style of popular music that originated in the folk music of the rural population of the southern and western United States and characterized by string-band instruments and simple melodies.
An underground railway.
A train that runs on such an underground railway.
An urban rapid transit light railway
A train that runs on such a railway.
A type, race or category; a group of entities that have common characteristics such that they may be grouped together.
definitions.example: This is a strange kind of tobacco.

definitions.definition: A makeshift or otherwise atypical specimen.
definitions.example: The opening served as a kind of window.

definitions.definition: One's inherent nature; character, natural disposition.
Family, lineage.
Manner.
Goods or services used as payment, as e.g. in barter.
Equivalent means used as response to an action.

definitions.definition: Each of the two elements of the communion service, bread and wine.
A domesticated plant, in species Cucurbita pepo, similar in growth pattern, foliage, flower, and fruit to the squash or melon.
The round yellow or orange fruit of this plant.
The color of the fruit of the pumpkin plant.
Any of a number of cultivars from the genus Cucurbita; known in the US as winter squash.
A term of endearment for someone small and cute.
An earthworm of the species Lumbricus terrestris, known for its large size and nocturnal surfacings.
(chiefly Northern US, Western US) More generally, any arbitrarily large earthworm, especially those favored in angling
An open stall, often on a street, where newspapers and magazines are on sale to the public
A slab of clay used for inscription.
A short scripture written by the founders of the Bahá'í faith.
A pill; a small, easily swallowed portion of a substance.

definitions.definition: A block of several sheets of blank paper that are bound together at the top; pad of paper.
A graphics tablet.
A tablet computer, a type of portable computer.
A confection made from sugar, condensed milk and butter, produced in flat slabs.
A type of round token giving authority for a train to proceed over a single-track line.
To form (a drug, etc.) into tablets.
A racquet: an implement with a handle connected to a round frame strung with wire, sinew, or plastic cords, and used to hit a ball, such as in tennis or a birdie in badminton.
A snowshoe formed of cords stretched across a long and narrow frame of light wood.
A broad wooden shoe or patten for a man or horse, to allow walking on marshy or soft ground.
To strike with, or as if with, a racket.
A rock; boulder; a hill.
A visible mass of water droplets suspended in the air.
Any mass of dust, steam or smoke resembling such a mass.
Anything which makes things foggy or gloomy.
Anything unsubstantial.
A dark spot on a lighter material or background.
A group or swarm, especially suspended above the ground or flying.

definitions.definition: An elliptical shape or symbol whose outline is a series of semicircles, supposed to resemble a cloud.
definitions.example: The comic-book character's thoughts appeared in a cloud above his head.

definitions.definition: (with "the") The Internet, regarded as an abstract amorphous omnipresent space for processing and storage, the focus of cloud computing.
A negative or foreboding aspect of something positive: see every cloud has a silver lining or every silver lining has a cloud.
Crystal methamphetamine.
A large, loosely-knitted headscarf worn by women.
To become foggy or gloomy, or obscured from sight.

definitions.definition: To make obscure.
definitions.example: All this talk about human rights is clouding the real issue.

definitions.definition: To make less acute or perceptive.
definitions.example: The tears began to well up and cloud my vision.

definitions.definition: To make gloomy or sullen.
To blacken; to sully; to stain; to tarnish (reputation or character).
To mark with, or darken in, veins or sports; to variegate with colors.

definitions.definition: To become marked, darkened or variegated in this way.
A soft mass of material stuffed into a cloth bag, used for comfort or support; for sitting on, kneeling on, resting one's head on etc.
Something acting as a cushion, especially to absorb a shock or impact.

A sufficient quantity of an intangible object (like points or minutes) to allow for some of those points, for example, to be lost without hurting one's chances for successfully completing an objective.
A riotous dance, formerly common at weddings.
To furnish with cushions.
definitions.example: to cushion a sofa

definitions.definition: To seat or place on, or as on a cushion.
To absorb or deaden the impact of.

definitions.definition: To conceal or cover up, as under a cushion.
Sound uttered by the mouth, especially by human beings in speech or song; sound thus uttered considered as possessing some special quality or character
definitions.example: His low voice allowed him to become a bass in the choir.

definitions.definition: Sound made through vibration of the vocal cords; sonant, or intonated, utterance; tone; — distinguished from mere breath sound as heard in whispering and voiceless consonants.
The tone or sound emitted by an object
The faculty or power of utterance

definitions.definition: That which is communicated; message; meaning.
An expressed opinion, choice, will, desire, or wish; the right or ability to make such expression or to have it considered
Command; precept.
One who speaks; a speaker.
A particular style or way of writing that expresses a certain tone or feeling.

(grammar) A particular way of inflecting or conjugating verbs, or a particular form of a verb, by means of which is indicated the relation of the subject of the verb to the action which the verb expresses.
definitions.example: The verbal system of Latin has two voices, active and passive.

definitions.definition: In harmony, an independent vocal or instrumental part in a piece of composition.
definitions.example: The theme of this piece constantly migrates between the three voice parts.

definitions.definition: (IRC) A flag associated with a user on a channel, determining whether or not they can send messages to the channel.
To give utterance or expression to; to utter; to publish; to announce
definitions.example: He voiced the sentiments of the nation.

definitions.definition: To utter audibly, with tone and not just breath.
To fit for producing the proper sounds; to regulate the tone of
definitions.example: voice the pipes of an organ

definitions.definition: To vote; to elect; to appoint
To clamor; to cry out
(IRC) To assign the voice flag to a user on IRC, permitting them to send messages to the channel.
To act as a voice actor to portray a character.
An act of leaking, or something that leaks
The amount lost due to a leak
An undesirable flow of electric current through insulation
Loss of retail stock, especially due to theft
(sound recording) The situation where sound is picked up by a microphone from a source other than that which is intended.
A collection of legends, in particular of lives of saints.
One who relates legends.
(Pokémon) A legendary Pokémon.
Of or pertaining to a legend or to legends.
Appearing (solely) in legends.
Having the splendor of a legend; fabled.
Having unimaginable greatness; excellent to such an extent to evoke stories
A structural element resembling the hollow upper half of a sphere; a cupola
Anything shaped like an upset bowl, often used as a cover

definitions.definition: Head (uppermost part of one's body)
Head, oral sex
A building; a house; an edifice
Any erection resembling the dome or cupola of a building, such as the upper part of a furnace, the vertical steam chamber on the top of a boiler, etc.

To give a domed shape to.
To perform fellatio on.
To bury in a grave.
To confine, as in a prison.
The key on a typewriter that moves the head one position backwards.

The non-printable text character representing a backspace.
To remove a character behind a cursor.
To move a magnetic tape to a previous block.
The act of offending:
The state of being offended or displeased; anger; displeasure.
A strategy and tactics employed when in position to score; contrasted with defense.
The portion of a team dedicated to scoring when in position to do so; contrasted with defense.
One of a set of choices that can be made.
The freedom or right to choose.

A contract giving the holder the right to buy or sell an asset at a set strike price; can apply to financial market transactions, or to ordinary transactions for tangible assets such as a residence or automobile.
To purchase an option on something.
definitions.example: The new novel was optioned by the film studio, but they'll probably never decide to make a movie from it.

definitions.definition: To configure, by setting an option.
Any craft designed for transportation on water, such as a ship or boat.
A craft designed for transportation through air or space.
Dishes and cutlery collectively, especially if made of precious metals.
A container of liquid or other substance, such as a glass, goblet, cup, bottle, bowl, or pitcher.
A person as a container of qualities or feelings.
A tube or canal that carries fluid in an animal or plant.
definitions.example: Blood and lymph vessels are found in humans; xylem and phloem vessels are found in plants.

definitions.definition: To put into a vessel.
An object designed to open and close a lock.
An object designed to fit between two other objects (such as a shaft and a wheel) in a mechanism and maintain their relative orientation.
A crucial step or requirement.
definitions.example: The key to solving this problem is persistence.

definitions.definition: A guide explaining the symbols or terminology of a map or chart; a legend.
definitions.example: The key says that A stands for the accounting department.

definitions.definition: A guide to the correct answers of a worksheet or test.
definitions.example: Some students cheated by using the answer key.

definitions.definition: One of several small, usually square buttons on a typewriter or computer keyboard, mostly corresponding to text characters.
definitions.example: Press the Escape key.

definitions.definition: In musical instruments, one of the valve levers used to select notes, such as a lever opening a hole on a woodwind.
In instruments with a keyboard such as an organ or piano, one of the levers, or especially the exposed front end of it, which are depressed to cause a particular sound or note to be produced.
The lowest note of a scale; keynote.
In musical theory, the total melodic and harmonic relations, which exist between the tones of an ideal scale, major or minor; tonality.
In musical theory and notation, the tonality centering in a given tone, or the several tones taken collectively, of a given scale, major or minor.
In musical notation, a sign at the head of a staff indicating the musical key.
The general pitch or tone of a sentence or utterance.
A modification of an advertisement so as to target a particular group or demographic.
An indehiscent, one-seeded fruit furnished with a wing, such as the fruit of the ash and maple; a samara.
A manual electrical switching device primarily used for the transmission of Morse code.
A piece of information (e.g. a passphrase) used to encode or decode a message or messages.
A password restricting access to an IRC channel.
In a relational database, a field used as an index into another table (not necessarily unique).
A value that uniquely identifies an entry in a container.
The free-throw lane together with the circle surrounding the free-throw line, the free-throw lane having formerly been narrower, giving the area the shape of a skeleton key hole.
definitions.example: He shoots from the top of the key.

definitions.definition: A series of logically organized groups of discriminating information which aims to allow the user to correctly identify a taxon.
A piece of wood used as a wedge.
The last board of a floor when laid down.
A keystone.
That part of the plastering which is forced through between the laths and holds the rest in place.
A wooden support for a rail on the bullhead rail system.
The degree of roughness, or retention ability of a surface to have applied a liquid such as paint, or glue.
definitions.example: The door panel should be sanded down carefully to provide a good key for the new paint.

definitions.definition: The thirty-third card of the Lenormand deck.
(print and film) The black ink layer, especially in relation to the three color layers of cyan, magenta, and yellow. See also CMYK.
A color to be masked or made transparent.
To fit (a lock) with a key.
To fit (pieces of a mechanical assembly) with a key to maintain the orientation between them.
To mark or indicate with a symbol indicating membership in a class.
(telegraphy and radio telegraphy) To depress (a telegraph key).
To operate (the transmitter switch of a two-way radio).
(more usually to key in) To enter (information) by typing on a keyboard or keypad.
definitions.example: Our instructor told us to key in our user IDs.

definitions.definition: To vandalize (a car, etc.) by scratching with an implement such as a key.
definitions.example: He keyed the car that had taken his parking spot.

definitions.definition: To link (as one might do with a key or legend).
To be identified as a certain taxon when using a key.
To modify (an advertisement) so as to target a particular group or demographic.
To attune to; to set at; to pitch.
To fasten or secure firmly; to fasten or tighten with keys or wedges.
Indispensable, supremely important.
definitions.example: He is the key player on his soccer team.

definitions.definition: Important, salient.
definitions.example: She makes several key points.

definitions.definition: A tile divided into two squares, each having 0 to 6 (or sometimes more) dots or pips (as in dice), used in the game of dominoes.
A country that is expected to react to events in a neighboring country, according to the domino effect.
A masquerade costume consisting of a hooded robe and a mask covering the upper part of the face.
The mask itself.
The person wearing the costume.
A polyomino made up of two squares.
A mistake in performing.
To collapse in the manner of dominoes.
To cause to collapse in the manner of dominoes.
(reflexive pronoun) Him; the male object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject
definitions.example: He injured himself.

definitions.definition: He; used as an intensifier, often to emphasize that the referent is the exclusive participant in the predicate
definitions.example: He was injured himself.

definitions.definition: The subject or non-reflexive object of a predicate; he himself.
The subject or non-reflexive object of a predicate; he (used of upper-class gentlemen, or sarcastically, of men who imagine themselves to be more important than others)
definitions.example: Has himself come down to breakfast yet?

definitions.definition: An abridgement or summary of a longer publication.
Something that concentrates in itself the qualities of a larger item, or multiple items.
An abstraction; an abstract term; that which is abstract.
The theoretical way of looking at things; something that exists only in idealized form.
An abstract work of art.
A summary title of the key points detailing a tract of land, for ownership; abstract of title.
To separate; to disengage.
To remove; to take away; withdraw.
To steal; to take away; to remove without permission.
To summarize; to abridge; to epitomize.

To conceptualize an ideal subgroup by means of the generalization of an attribute, as follows: by apprehending an attribute inherent to one individual, then separating that attribute and contemplating it by itself, then conceiving of that attribute as a general quality, then despecifying that conceived quality with respect to several or many individuals, and by then ideating a group composed of those individuals perceived to possess said quality.
To extract by means of distillation.
To consider abstractly; to contemplate separately or by itself; to consider theoretically; to look at as a general quality.
To withdraw oneself; to retire.
To draw off (interest or attention).
definitions.example: He was wholly abstracted by other objects.

definitions.definition: To perform the process of abstraction.
To create abstractions.
To produce an abstraction, usually by refactoring existing code. Generally used with "out".
definitions.example: He abstracted out the square root function.

definitions.definition: Derived; extracted.
Drawn away; removed from; apart from; separate.
Not concrete: conceptual, ideal.
Difficult to understand; abstruse; hard to conceptualize.
Separately expressing a property or attribute of an object that is considered to be inherent to that object: attributive, ascriptive.

Pertaining comprehensively to, or representing, a class or group of objects, as opposed to any specific object; considered apart from any application to a particular object: general, generic, nonspecific; representational.
Absent-minded.
Pertaining to the formal aspect of art, such as the lines, colors, shapes, and the relationships among them.
Insufficiently factual.
Apart from practice or reality; vague; theoretical; impersonal; not applied.
(grammar) As a noun, denoting an intangible as opposed to an object, place, or person.
Of a class in object-oriented programming, being a partial basis for subclasses rather than a complete template for objects.
A member of a cabal.
A person skilled in esoteric matters.
A student of the Jewish Kaballah.

A vent or fissure on the surface of a planet (usually in a mountainous form) with a magma chamber attached to the mantle of a planet or moon, periodically erupting forth lava and volcanic gases onto the surface.
A form of firework.
An amusing story.
Something said or done for amusement, not in seriousness.
definitions.example: It was a joke!

definitions.definition: The root cause or main issue, especially an unexpected one
A laughably worthless thing or person; a sham.
definitions.example: The president was a joke.

definitions.definition: To do or say something for amusement rather than seriously.
definitions.example: I didn’t mean what I said — I was only joking.

definitions.definition: (intransitive, followed by with) To dupe in a friendly manner for amusement; to mess with, play with.
definitions.example: Relax, man, I'm just joking with you.

definitions.definition: To make merry with; to make jokes upon; to rally.
definitions.example: to joke a comrade

definitions.definition: Really good.
Funny or entertaining.
definitions.example: Man, that video is bare jokes!

definitions.definition: Any of several animals related to Equus ferus caballus.
Equipment with legs.
Type of equipment.

A mass of earthy matter, or rock of the same character as the wall rock, occurring in the course of a vein, as of coal or ore; hence, to take horse (said of a vein) is to divide into branches for a distance.
The sedative, antidepressant, and anxiolytic drug morphine, chiefly when used illicitly.

An informal variant of basketball in which players match shots made by their opponent(s), each miss adding a letter to the word "horse", with 5 misses spelling the whole word and eliminating a player, until only the winner is left. Also HORSE, H-O-R-S-E or H.O.R.S.E. (see Variations of basketball#H-O-R-S-E).
(among students) A translation or other illegitimate aid in study or examination.
(among students) horseplay; tomfoolery
A receptacle for ash and butts from cigarettes and cigars.
To inspect; to examine.
definitions.example: Check the oil in your car once a month.

definitions.definition: To verify the accuracy of a text or translation, usually making some corrections (proofread) or many (copyedit).

(often used with "off") To mark items on a list (with a checkmark or by crossing them out) that have been chosen for keeping or removal or that have been dealt with (for example, completed or verified as correct or satisfactory).
definitions.example: Check off the items that you've checked (inspected).

definitions.definition: To control, limit, or halt.
definitions.example: Check your enthusiasm during a negotiation.

definitions.definition: To verify or compare with a source of information.
definitions.example: Check your data against known values.

definitions.definition: To leave in safekeeping.
definitions.example: Check your hat and coat at the door.

definitions.definition: To leave with a shipping agent for shipping.
definitions.example: Check your bags at the ticket counter before the flight.

definitions.definition: To pass or bounce the ball to an opponent from behind the three-point line and have the opponent pass or bounce it back to start play.
definitions.example: He checked the ball and then proceeded to perform a perfect layup.

definitions.definition: To disrupt another player with the stick or body to obtain possession of the ball or puck.
definitions.example: The hockey player checked the defenceman to obtain the puck.

definitions.definition: To remain in a hand without betting. Only legal if no one has yet bet.
definitions.example: Tom didn't think he could win, so he checked.

definitions.definition: To make a move which puts an adversary's king in check; to put in check.
To chide, rebuke, or reprove.
To slack or ease off, as a brace which is too stiffly extended.
To crack or gape open, as wood in drying; or to crack in small checks, as varnish, paint, etc.
To make checks or chinks in; to cause to crack.
definitions.example: The sun checks timber.

definitions.definition: To make a stop; to pause; with at.
To clash or interfere.
To act as a curb or restraint.
To turn, when in pursuit of proper game, and fly after other birds.
To mark with a check pattern.
The act of physically keeping an opposing player in check.
A checking account.
definitions.example: Withdraw $5000 from checking and put it into savings.

definitions.definition: Of or belonging to a king or kings; exercised by a king.
Characteristic of kings, majestic, regal.
A motion of the limbs or body, especially one made to emphasize speech.
definitions.example: The middle-finger gesture is really a nonverbal swear.

definitions.definition: An act or a remark made as a formality or as a sign of attitude.
definitions.example: We took flowers as a gesture of sympathy.

definitions.definition: The manner of carrying the body; position of the body or limbs; posture.
To make a gesture or gestures.
definitions.example: My dad said to never gesture with my hands when I talk.

definitions.definition: To express something by a gesture or gestures.
definitions.example: He gestured his disgust.

definitions.definition: To accompany or illustrate with gesture or action.
A pain or ache in the head.
A nuisance or unpleasant problem.
definitions.example: The clumsy filing system has been a huge headache.

definitions.definition: Something which is not genuine, or is presented fraudulently.
A trick; a swindle.
A move meant to deceive an opposing player, used for gaining advantage for example when dribbling an opponent.
One of the circles or windings of a cable or hawser, as it lies in a coil; a single turn or coil.
A loose filmy mass or a thin chiplike layer of anything
definitions.example: There were a few flakes of paint on the floor from when we were painting the walls.

definitions.definition: A scale of a fish or similar animal
A prehistoric tool chipped out of stone.
A person who is impractical, flighty, unreliable, or inconsistent; especially with maintaining a living.
definitions.example: She makes pleasant conversation, but she's kind of a flake when it comes time for action.

definitions.definition: A carnation with only two colours in the flower, the petals having large stripes.
A flat turn or tier of rope.
To break or chip off in a flake.
definitions.example: The paint flaked off after only a year.

definitions.definition: To prove unreliable or impractical; to abandon or desert, to fail to follow through.
definitions.example: He said he'd come and help, but he flaked.

definitions.definition: To store an item such as rope or sail in layers
definitions.example: The line is flaked into the container for easy attachment and deployment.

definitions.definition: To hit (another person).
A paling; a hurdle.
A platform of hurdles, or small sticks made fast or interwoven, supported by stanchions, for drying codfish and other things.
A small stage hung over a vessel's side, for workmen to stand on while calking, etc.
That has grown inwards or abnormally towards (a part of the body)
definitions.example: an ingrown toenail

definitions.definition: One who rides, often on a horse or a motorcycle.
A provision annexed to a bill under the consideration of a legislature, having little connection with the subject matter of the bill.
(by extension) Something extra or burdensome that is imposed.
An amendment or addition to an entertainer's performance contract, often covering a performer's equipment or food, drinks, and general comfort requirements.
An additional benefit attached to an insurance contract.
A small, sliding piece of aluminium on a chemical balance, used to determine small weights.
An agent who goes out with samples of goods to obtain orders; a commercial traveller.
One who breaks in or manages a horse.
The first Lenormand card, also known as either the horseman or the cavalier.
A problem of extra difficulty added to another on an examination paper.
An old Dutch gold coin with the figure of a man on horseback stamped upon it.
Rock material in a vein of ore, dividing it.
An interior rib occasionally fixed in a ship's hold, reaching from the keelson to the beams of the lower deck, to strengthen the frame.
The second tier of casks in a vessel's hold.
A small forked weight which straddles the beam of a balance, along which it can be moved in the manner of the weight on a steelyard.
A robber.
A piece, such as the rook or bishop, which moves any distance in one direction, as long as no other piece is in the way.
Diligent inquiry or examination to seek or revise facts, principles, theories, applications, etc.; laborious or continued search after truth.
definitions.example: The research station that houses Wang and his team is outside Lijiang, a city of about 1.2 million people.

definitions.definition: A particular instance or piece of research.
To search or examine with continued care; to seek diligently.
To make an extensive investigation into.
To search again.

A white liquid produced by the mammary glands of female mammals to nourish their young. From certain animals, especially cows, it is also called dairy milk and is a common food for humans as a beverage or used to produce various dairy products such as butter, cheese, and yogurt.
A white (or whitish) liquid obtained from a vegetable source such as almonds, coconuts, oats, rice, and/or soy beans. Also called non-dairy milk.
An individual serving of milk.
definitions.example: Table three ordered three milks. (Formally: The guests at table three ordered three glasses of milk.)

definitions.definition: An individual portion of milk, such as found in a creamer, for tea and coffee.
definitions.example: I take my tea with two milk(s) and two sugar.

definitions.definition: The ripe, undischarged spat of an oyster.
Semen.
A type of small boat, covered over by a surface deck, powered by the occupant or occupants using a double-bladed paddle in a sitting position, from a hole in the surface deck
To use a kayak, to travel or race in a kayak.
definitions.example: Kayaking is an Olympic sport.

definitions.definition: To traverse (a body of water) by kayak.
definitions.example: On a dare, he kayaked the Harlem River in New York from Hell's Gate to Spyten Duyvil.

definitions.definition: The ability to read and write.
Understanding of something (ex. computer literacy).
One who performs gymnastics
An adult male human.
definitions.example: The show is especially popular with middle-aged men.

definitions.definition: (collective) All human males collectively: mankind.
A human, a person of either gender, usually an adult. (See usage notes.)
definitions.example: every man for himself

definitions.definition: (collective) All humans collectively: mankind, humankind, humanity. (Sometimes capitalized as Man.)
A member of the genus Homo, especially of the species Homo sapiens.
An male person, usually an adult; a (generally adult male) sentient being, whether human, supernatural, elf, alien, etc.
An adult male who has, to an eminent degree, qualities considered masculine, such as strength, integrity, and devotion to family; a mensch.
Manliness; the quality or state of being manly.
A husband.
A lover; a boyfriend.
A male enthusiast or devotee; a male who is very fond of or devoted to a specified kind of thing. (Used as the last element of a compound.)
definitions.example: Some people prefer apple pie, but me, I’m a cherry pie man.

definitions.definition: A person, usually male, who has duties or skills associated with a specified thing. (Used as the last element of a compound.)
definitions.example: I wanted to be a guitar man on a road tour, but instead I’m a flag man on a road crew.

definitions.definition: A person, usually male, who can fulfill one's requirements with regard to a specified matter.
A male who belongs to a particular group: an employee, a student or alumnus, a representative, etc.
An adult male servant.
A vassal; a subject.
definitions.example: Like master, like man.

definitions.definition: A piece or token used in board games such as chess.
Used to refer to oneself or one's group: I, we; construed in the third person.
A term of familiar address often implying on the part of the speaker some degree of authority, impatience, or haste.
definitions.example: Come on, man, we've got no time to lose!

definitions.definition: A friendly term of address usually reserved for other adult males.
definitions.example: Hey, man, how's it goin'?

definitions.definition: A player on whom another is playing, with the intent of limiting their attacking impact.
A person trained in ninjutsu, especially one used for espionage, assassination, and other tasks requiring stealth during Japan's shogunate period.
A person considered similarly skillful to the historical ninja, especially in covert or stealthy operation.
A person considered to look like the historical ninja in some way, including (Mongolia) amateur private miners.
To act or move like a ninja, particularly with regard to a combination of speed, power, and stealth.
To claim an item through abuse of game mechanics.
definitions.example: That damn warrior ninja'd an epic-quality wand even though he can't even use it!

definitions.definition: Of or related to ninjas in their various senses.
To appropriate something (before someone else does).
To displace something, or take precedence over something.
To secure (land, etc.) by the right of preemption.
To make a preemptive bid at bridge.
Cuddly; pleasant to snuggle with.
definitions.example: My blanket is very snuggly.

definitions.definition: Fond of snuggling.
definitions.example: Nicole was a very snuggly girl after she broke up with her boyfriend.

definitions.definition: Tightly, with limited space to move, in a snug manner.
definitions.example: The peg fit so snugly in the hole that it couldn't be pulled out by hand.

definitions.definition: Attempted remediation of a health problem following a diagnosis, usually synonymous with treatment.
Healing power or quality.
To treat with a therapy.
To undergo a therapy.
A telecommunication device (originally mechanical, and now electronic) used for two-way talking with another person (now often shortened to phone).
The game of Chinese whispers.
To (attempt to) contact someone using the telephone.
To convey (a message) by telephoning.
Something that prevents, hampers, or hinders.
definitions.example: Age is often a handicap.

definitions.definition: An allowance of a certain amount of time or distance in starting, granted in a race (or other contest of skill) to the competitor possessing disadvantages; or an additional weight or other hindrance imposed upon the one possessing advantages, in order to equalize, as much as possible, the chances of success.
definitions.example: A handicap in chess often involves removal of the queen's rook.

definitions.definition: (sometimes considered offensive) The disadvantage itself, in particular physical or mental disadvantages of people.
A race or similar contest in which there is an allowance of time, distance, weight, or other advantage, to equalize the chances of the competitors.
(card game) An old card game, similar to lanterloo.
To encumber with a handicap in any contest.
(by extension) To place at disadvantage.
definitions.example: The candidate was handicapped by her lack of experience.

definitions.definition: To estimate betting odds.
definitions.example: Grandpa Andy would buy the racing form the day ahead of time so he could handicap the race before he even arrived at the track.

definitions.definition: Someone who routes or directs items from one location to another.
definitions.example: The router directed the movement of the company's trucks.

definitions.definition: Any device that directs packets of information using the equivalent of Open Systems Interconnection layer 3 (network layer) information. Most commonly used in reference to Internet Protocol routers.

A device that connects local area networks to form a larger internet by, at minimum, selectively passing those datagrams having a destination IP address to the network which is able to deliver them to their destination; a network gateway.
definitions.example: The router was configured to forward packets outside of a certain range of IP addresses to its internet uplink port.

definitions.definition: (electronic design automation) In integrated circuit or printed circuit board design, an algorithm for adding all wires needed to properly connect all of the placed components while obeying all design rules.
One who erases.
A thing used to erase or remove something written or drawn by a pen or a pencil.
definitions.example: I have worn out the eraser on this pencil.

definitions.definition: A thing used to erase something written by chalk on a chalkboard, by marker on a whiteboard, or by some other erasable implement; a chalkboard eraser, whiteboard eraser, etc.
An overwriter program used to prevent data recovery.
A place where stars, planets and other celestial bodies are observed, usually through a telescope; also place for observing meteorological or other natural phenomena.
A lookout (vantage point with a view of the surrounding area)
Having a distinctive odor.
definitions.example: The table was piled with odorous lilies.

definitions.definition: A strong feeling of anxiety.
definitions.example: I'm afflicted by worry throughout the night.

definitions.definition: An instance or cause of such a feeling.
definitions.example: My main worry is that I'll miss the train.

definitions.definition: To be troubled; to give way to mental anxiety or doubt.
definitions.example: Stop worrying about your test, it’ll be fine.

definitions.definition: Disturb the peace of mind of; afflict with mental agitation or distress.
definitions.example: Your tone of voice worries me.

definitions.definition: To harass; to irritate or distress.
definitions.example: The President was worried into military action by persistent advisors.

definitions.definition: To seize or shake by the throat, especially of a dog or wolf.
definitions.example: Your dog’s been worrying sheep again.

definitions.definition: To touch repeatedly, to fiddle with.
To strangle.
Any period of seven consecutive days.
A period of seven days beginning with Sunday or Monday.
A period of five days beginning with Monday.
A subdivision of the month into longer periods of work days punctuated by shorter weekend periods of days for markets, rest, or religious observation such as a sabbath.
definitions.example: A 4-day week consists of Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday.

definitions.definition: Seven days after (sometimes before) a specified date.
definitions.example: I'll see you Thursday week.

definitions.definition: An old, dilapidated or unpretentious automobile.
A hip, cool, groovy automobile.
The branch of medicine concerned with the study of the nature of disease and its causes, processes, development, and consequences.
The medical specialty that provides microscopy and other laboratory services (e.g., cytology, histology) to clinicians.
definitions.example: The surgeon sent a specimen of the cyst to the pathology department for staining and analysis to determine its histologic subtype.

definitions.definition: Pathosis: any deviation from a healthy or normal structure or function; abnormality; illness or malformation.
To deny the existence, evidence, or truth of; to contradict.
definitions.example: The investigation tending to negate any supernatural influences.

definitions.definition: To nullify or cause to be ineffective.
definitions.example: Persecution can be negated through exposure.

definitions.definition: To be negative; bring or cause negative results.
definitions.example: a pessimism that always negates

definitions.definition: To perform the NOT operation on.
Of or pertaining to the sun; proceeding from the sun
definitions.example: solar influence

definitions.definition: Born under the predominant influence of the sun.
Measured by the progress or revolution of the sun in the ecliptic; as, the solar year.
Produced by the action of the sun, or peculiarly affected by its influence.
A sparkle or glimmer of light
A sparkle of delight in the eyes.
definitions.example: He was a rotund, jolly man with a twinkle in his eye.

definitions.definition: A flitting movement
A brief moment; a twinkling.
The female genitalia.
definitions.example: The popular Swedish cartoon song about genitals was translated as "Willie and Twinkle".

definitions.definition: (of a source of light) to shine with a flickering light; to glimmer
definitions.example: We could see the lights of the village twinkling in the distance.

definitions.definition: (chiefly of eyes) to be bright with delight
definitions.example: His shrewd little eyes twinkled roguishly.

definitions.definition: To bat, blink or wink the eyes
To flit to and fro
The assessed value of an asset from which the tax owing is computed.
An electronic communication medium that allows the transmission of real-time visual images, and often sound.
definitions.example: It’s a good thing that television doesn’t transmit smell.

definitions.definition: A device for receiving television signals and displaying them in visual form.
definitions.example: I have an old television in the study.

definitions.definition: Collectively, the programs broadcast via the medium of television.
definitions.example: fifty-seven channels and nothing on television

definitions.definition: Vision at a distance.
The amount of air breathed in or out during normal respiration.
A person who sometimes wears clothes traditionally worn by and associated with the opposite sex; typically a male who cross-dresses occasionally by habit or personal choice.

A person, typically a heterosexual male, who compulsively seeks and derives paraphilic sexual arousal from cross-dressing, especially if the urges and behavior cause the patient distress or social impairment.
Act of requesting (with the adposition at in the presence of possessives, and on in their absence).
A formal message requesting something.
Condition of being sought after.
A message sent over a network to a server.
definitions.example: The server returned a 404 error to the HTTP request.

definitions.definition: That which is asked for or requested.
To ask for (something).
definitions.example: I have requested that the furniture be moved back to its original position.

definitions.definition: To ask (somebody) to do something.
definitions.example: She called me into her office and requested me to sit down.

definitions.definition: A lower-ranking officer who assists a higher-ranking officer with administrative affairs.
An assistant.
Any bird of the genus Leptoptilos, a branch of the stork family (Ciconiidae) native to India and Southeast Asia.
Assistant; who helps a higher-ranking officer.
definitions.example: adjutant officer

definitions.definition: To add caffeine to.
To drink caffeinated beverages in order to increase one's energy or wakefulness or to enhance physical or mental performance.
To inject tension into (a situation, etc.) for one's own amusement; to stir things up.
To provoke (a person) for one's own amusement.

Containing caffeine naturally (e.g., coffee, tea, and cacao [whose seeds are used to make cocoa, chocolate, and their various derivative products]) or as an additive (e.g., soft drinks, sports drinks, or energy drinks).
Overly peppy or energetic (as in a person or pet).
A terrifying and dangerous creature.
A bizarre or whimsical creature.
definitions.example: The children decided Grover was a cuddly monster.

definitions.definition: A cruel or antisocial person, especially a criminal.
definitions.example: Get away from those children, you meatheaded monster!

definitions.definition: A horribly deformed person.
A badly behaved child, a brat.
definitions.example: Sit still, you little monster!

definitions.definition: Something unusually large.
definitions.example: Have you seen those powerlifters on TV? They're monsters.

definitions.definition: A prodigy; someone very talented in a specific domain.
definitions.example: That dude playing guitar is a monster.

definitions.definition: A non-player character that player(s) fight against in role-playing games.
To make into a monster; to categorise as a monster; to demonise.
To behave as a monster to; to terrorise.
To harass.
Very large; worthy of a monster.
definitions.example: He has a monster appetite.

definitions.definition: Great; very good; excellent.
One of the components of a compound leaf.
A small plant leaf.
definitions.example: The new leaflets at the end of the branch were a lighter shade of green than the mature leaves.

definitions.definition: A small sheet of paper containing information, used for dissemination of said information, often an advertisement.
definitions.example: A leaflet had been left under the car's windshield wiper.

definitions.definition: A flap of a valve of a heart or blood vessel.
To distribute leaflets to.
definitions.example: A sidewalk preacher gave an impassioned sermon while an assistant leafleted those who stayed to listen.

definitions.definition: To distribute leaflets.
definitions.example: During the summer, Peter earned some extra cash by leafleting for a local pizza delivery restaurant.

definitions.definition: An exercise session; a period of physical exercise.
A schedule or program of specific exercises, especially one intended to achieve a particular goal.
(by extension) Any activity that requires much physical or mental effort, or produces strain.
A raised stage from which speeches are made and on which musical and other performances are made.
A raised floor for any purpose, e.g. for workmen during construction, or formerly for military cannon.
A place or an opportunity to express one's opinion; a tribune.
definitions.example: This new talk show will give a platform to everyday men and women.

definitions.definition: A kind of high shoe with an extra layer between the inner and outer soles.
Something that allows an enterprise to advance; a foundation or stage.
A set of components shared by several vehicle models.
A computer system used to deliver services to clients; a solution

A particular type of operating system or environment such as a database or other specific software, and/or a particular type of computer or microprocessor, used to describe a particular environment for running other software, or for defining a specific software or hardware environment for discussion purposes.
definitions.example: That program runs on the X Window System platform.

definitions.definition: A flat expanse of rock, often the result of wave erosion.
A light deck, usually placed in a section of the hold or over the floor of the magazine.
A political stance on a broad set of issues, which are called planks.
(travel) A raised structure from which passengers can enter or leave a train, metro etc.
A plan; a sketch; a model; a pattern.
To furnish with or shape into a platform
To place on, or as if on, a platform.
To form a plan of; to model; to lay out.
To include in a political platform
To publish or make visible; to provide a platform for (a topic etc.).
To open (a film) in a small number of theaters before a broader release in order to generate enthusiasm.
To stuff.
To furnish with a pad or padding.
To increase the size of, especially by adding undesirable filler.
definitions.example: May 21, 2008, Austin American-Statesman

definitions.definition: To imbue uniformly with a mordant.
definitions.example: to pad cloth

definitions.definition: To deliberately play the ball with the leg pad instead of the bat.
To travel along (a road, path etc.).
To travel on foot.
To wear a path by walking.
To walk softly, quietly or steadily, especially without shoes.
To practise highway robbery.
Soft filling material used in cushions etc.
Extra characters such as spaces added to a record to fill it out to a fixed length.
Extraneous text added to a message for the purpose of concealing its beginning, ending, or length.
Anything of little value used to fill up space.
definitions.example: That magazine is mostly advertisements; the rest is padding.

definitions.definition: A vessel for decanting liquor.
A receptacle for decanted liquor, especially a crystal bottle with a stopper.
A shout of “Hallelujah”.
A song of praise to God; a musical composition based on the word "Hallelujah".
definitions.example: the hallelujah (chorus) in Handel's "Messiah"

definitions.definition: (in the plural) General praise.
To cry "hallelujah" in praise.
An exclamation used in songs of praise or thanksgiving to God.
A general expression of gratitude or adoration.
definitions.example: Hallelujah! It’s finally the weekend!

definitions.definition: The condition or state of being (or becoming) bald.
definitions.example: the baldness of an assertion
